What if her two personalities (Homura and Moemura) were merged?

Source: https://www.reddit.com/r/MadokaMagica/comments/1guealx/so_i_made_a_homura_redesign_how_we_feeling/?show=original

Homura Akemi (暁美ほむら, Akemi Homura) is one of the five main Magical Girls in the anime and manga series Puella Magi Madoka☆Magica. She is a second-year student at Mitakihara Middle School and is in the same class as Madoka and Sayaka.

Source: https://madoka.fandom.com/wiki/Homura_Akemi
